name: Clam Chowder (Red Lobster)
recipeIngredient: 2 Baked potatoes - cooked, peeled, and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the clam juice, milk powder, and flour. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a saucepan holding 2-1/2 quarts of liquid.
3. Stir in the chicken broth, stirring constantly on medium-high heat until thick and smooth.
4. Turn off the heat to low.
5. Stir in the chopped celery, onions, minced clams, and parsley.
6. Keep the mixture on low heat for up to an hour, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
7. This dish freezes well.
